info.name: ChatWave Backend API
info.description:
Complete production-ready API collection for ChatWave — WhatsApp Business Platform.

Includes 486+ endpoints organized by module with realistic request bodies and authentication.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create an environment with variables: `baseUrl`, `authToken`
3. Run "Login with Email/Phone" to get your auth token
4. Set `authToken` variable with the received JWT token

## Authentication
- Most endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
- Alternatively use `x-api-key: <key>` header
